---
title: "04_profiles"
author: "Anish"
date: "2026-04-29"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo=TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = 8, fig.height = 5, dpi = 110
)

library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(rpart)
library(rpart.plot)

theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 12))
```
